hero.title: Ace Your Vue.js Interview
hero.description: Prepare for Vue.js frontend developer interviews with topic-wise guides, coding problems, reactivity patterns, and real-world scenarios used by top tech companies.

vue.js fundamentals.description: Vue instance, template syntax, directives, data binding, and computed properties.

components & props.description: Component registration, props validation, slots, and component communication.

reactivity system.description: Reactive data, refs, reactive(), computed, watch, and reactivity fundamentals.

vue directives.description: v-if, v-for, v-model, v-bind, v-on, custom directives, and modifiers.

vue router.description: Route configuration, navigation guards, dynamic routes, nested routes, and lazy loading.

state management.description: Vuex (state, getters, mutations, actions) and Pinia (stores, composables).

composition API.description: setup(), refs, reactive, lifecycle hooks, composables, and code organization.

forms & validation.description: v-model binding, form inputs, custom validation, and form libraries.

lifecycle hooks.description: Creation, mounting, updating, unmounting hooks, and error handling.

performance optimization.description: Computed caching, v-once, v-memo, keep-alive, lazy loading, and bundle optimization.

testing vue apps.description: Vue Test Utils, Vitest, Jest, component testing, and E2E testing.

real-world projects & problems.description: Real interview questions, component building, and full application scenarios.

seo.title: Vue.js Interview Preparation Guide | Frontend Developer
seo.description: Comprehensive interview preparation for Vue.js developer roles: components, reactivity, Vue Router, Vuex/Pinia, Composition API, performance optimization, and real-world applications.
